column2: CAA Officer Does Not Raise Observation
column3: ['The user logs in as a CAA officer. ', "The user navigates to an entity approval holder's record. ", 'The user decides not to raise an observation for potential future non-compliance or safety improvement opportunities. ', 'The entity approval holder checks their observations. ']
column4: ["The system confirms the user's identity and grants access to the platform. ", "The user is able to view the entity approval holder's details on the platform. ", 'No observation is created in the system by the CAA officer. ', 'There are no new observations from the CAA officer in their list. ']
